allow: PowerShell($url = "https://file.localdata.go.kr/file/cctv_info/info"; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -Method Head -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $resp.Headers | Format-List } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($url = "https://file.localdata.go.kr/file/cctv_info/info"; $headers = @{ "User-Agent" = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" }; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -Headers $headers -Method Get -MaximumRedirection 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Final URL: $\($resp.BaseResponse.ResponseUri\)"; Write-Output "Content-Type: $\($resp.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; Write-Output "Content-Length: $\($resp.Headers['Content-Length']\)"; Write-Output "Content-Disposition: $\($resp.Headers['Content-Disposition']\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { Write-Output "Status code: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" } })

PowerShell($urls = @\("https://www.localdata.go.kr/data/dataView.do?opnSvcId=00CCTV", "https://file.localdata.go.kr/file/cctv_info/info.csv", "https://file.localdata.go.kr/cctv_info.csv"\); $headers = @{ "User-Agent" = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"; "Referer" = "https://www.data.go.kr/" }; foreach \($u in $urls\) { Write-Output "--- $u"; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Headers $headers -Method Head -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "OK Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\), Content-Type: $\($resp.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(python --version; python -c "import pandas, geopandas, shapely, openpyxl; print\('pandas:', pandas.__version__\); print\('geopandas:', geopandas.__version__\); print\('shapely:', shapely.__version__\); print\('openpyxl:', openpyxl.__version__\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(python -c "import nbformat; nb = nbformat.read\(r'C:\\Users\\pjhic\\Projects\\Seoul_bigdata\\notebooks\\01_data_verification.ipynb', as_version=4\); errors = [c for c in nb.cells if c.cell_type=='code' and any\(o.output_type=='error' for o in c.get\('outputs',[]\)\)]; print\(f'에러 셀: {len\(errors\)}/{len\([c for c in nb.cells if c.cell_type==\\"code\\"]\)}'\); [print\('---', i, c.source[:100], '...\\n', [o.ename + \\": \\" + o.evalue for o in c.outputs if o.output_type==\\"error\\"]\) for i,c in enumerate\(errors\)]")

PowerShell(python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; import requests; print\('dotenv: OK'\); print\('requests:', requests.__version__\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, r'C:\\Users\\pjhic\\Projects\\Seoul_bigdata\\src'\); import search; print\('search 모듈 import OK'\); print\('함수:', [x for x in dir\(search\) if not x.startswith\('_'\) and callable\(getattr\(search, x\)\)]\); print\('API 키 설정 여부:', bool\(search.KAKAO_KEY\)\)" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'주소: {d[\\"address\\"]}'\); print\(f'종합: {d[\\"total_score\\"]}점 \({d[\\"grade\\"]}\)'\); print\(f'요약: {d[\\"one_line_summary\\"]}'\); print\(\); [print\(f'  {c[\\"name\\"]:<14} {c[\\"score\\"]:>3}점' if c.get\('active'\) else f'  {c[\\"name\\"]:<14} \(미적용\)'\) for c in d['category_scores'].values\(\)]; print\(\); print\('AI 리포트:'\); print\(d['ai_report'][:200] + '...'\)")
